text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Tama looks like she's been having a lot of fun
lately. She's full of energy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We're going to put in just as much effort ourselves, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I didn't know you two were comin' to
watch!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam, your form today was fantastic. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You must be hungry after running like that. Why
don't you get changed so we can all go to that
place that serves up Everest-sized bowls of soy
and pork ramen?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It'll be our treat to you for working so very
hard. ♪ What a good girl you are.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My belly's not big enough to manage
Everest-sized portions! And quit it with da "good
girl" stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, I guess you could say I've been ridin'
high!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Since I paired up with Trainer, it feels kinda like
my body's been loosenin' up? And my runnin' and
comebacks are gettin' sharper.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not like my trainin's got anythin' to do with my
gags, though!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh Tamtam, it's so nice to see you growing
up. You're so big and strong now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I think I'll follow your example. Maybe it's time for me to try two Everest bowls...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And I'll do the same and spoil you even more,
Tamtam. ♪
